description: VERIFIED LIVE: 搜狐 (Sohu) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links carry a /a/<id> path with the headline as link text. Navigate the tab to sohu.com (home or a channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 173 article links — headline + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: sohu_headlines
tools.description: Article links on the current 搜狐 page (home or a channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and url (sohu.com/a/<id>). VERIFIED (173 articles).
